goal: Complete T0401-T0407 with fail-closed document classification, unified private lineage, bounded attachment parsers, explicit PDF-password deferral, deterministic age-only versioned Processed products, parser blue-green current-pointer control and strict public inventory rendering without production authority.
scope: all frozen document classes with VERIFIED_UNKNOWN retention
versioned classification and parser registries that remain empty without protected evidence
verified-Raw-bound Document Envelope with UTC, Australia/Sydney, attachment and field lineage
bounded in-memory PDF, XLSX and CSV extraction
profile-driven Daily, Monthly, Contract Note and Financial Year parsing without guessed fields
deterministic Canonical JSONL and explicit-schema Parquet
official-age encryption before all private Processed persistence boundaries
immutable parser-version paths, fourteen-day blue-green comparison and strict current-pointer CAS
bucket-only public inventory with HMAC opaque root
local synthetic Stage 4 evidence and no-Secret CI definition
non_goals: real Gmail authorization, message access or mutation
activation of production classification or parser profiles without protected first-party evidence
Moomoo Portal access, download, scraping or automation
real private repository lookup, write, decrypt, recovery or public evidence publication
production PDF password retrieval or brute force
protected parser promotion approval or real fourteen-day observation
timeline rendering, production scheduling or deployment
protected_oracles: authoritative owner-approved real Moomoo AU templates and exact production classification rules
protected real PDF, XLSX and CSV parser Golden Fixtures and canaries
production PDF password Secret delivery and protected reprocess
real private GitHub versioned Processed append, current-pointer CAS and remote recovery
fourteen elapsed days of protected parser blue-green observation
protected approval for any changed business output
real public inventory publication and leak scan
AC-002, AC-014 through AC-017, AC-029, AC-031, AC-032 and AC-034 final oracles
rollback: Revert the single local Stage 4 commit; Stage 3 remains at its pinned verified commit and no remote state has changed.
stop_conditions: frozen Stage 0 manifest or cumulative Stage 3 gate drifts
real or sensitive sender, message, account, amount, credential or repository data enters the publishable tree
a production classification or parser profile would need to be inferred from unavailable evidence
an incorrect or absent PDF password can produce trusted structured data
plaintext can reach a Processed persistence adapter
an old Processed version can be overwritten or current can change without exact CAS
a protected oracle would require credential, mailbox, private-repository or remote-write authority
Stage 5 behavior is required to make a Stage 4 local gate pass
